user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the list of leave email templates showing template type ID, email type, and description, so that I can review which email notifications are configured.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Email Templates screen; When the list loads; Then I see each template's email type, description, and task with paging showing items 1-5 of 5

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view an individual email template using the View task action, so that I can inspect its content before it is sent.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Email Templates screen; When I click View on a template row; Then the template details are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the email templates list, so that I always see the current set of configured templates.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Email Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with the latest templates

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through the email templates list, so that I can navigate large numbers of templates.
acceptance_criteria: Given the email templates list has multiple pages; When I click Next; Then the next page of templates is displayed
